description: Discrete grid-stepping movement on a fixed cadence; continuous (Snake) or step-per-press (Sokoban). Writes position directly — no velocity integrator needed. 1.1.0 adds an optional `moveAction` that reads a logical input action (input-actions, E1) so keyboard and a touch d-pad steer through one channel — no synthesized key events.

snap.description: Snap to the tile grid each step.

moveAction.description: Optional logical-action name (E1) to steer by instead of raw keys — unifies keyboard + touch via input-actions. Unset = key path (default, byte-identical).
